creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
Hi!

In general, the fonts on the FreeBSD website are ok -- in contrast to many other sites, where often the default fonts are either way too small or way too large.

But the fonts on "security advisories" and "errata notices" are too small.  I enlarge them two times to get the default font size, they are readable when enlarging once.

With kind regards, "Walter von Entferndt"
